title: Account page — delete account with confirmation dialog
description: Implement the Delete Account section with a confirmation dialog before permanently deleting the account and all data.
acceptanceCriteria: Delete Account section has a red destructive 'Delete Account' button
Clicking the button opens a shadcn/ui Dialog with a warning message
Dialog warns that all data will be permanently deleted
Clicking Cancel closes the dialog without action
Clicking 'Delete Account' in the dialog calls DELETE /api/user/me
On success: clears localStorage token and redirects to /login
Delete button in dialog shows loading state during API call

steps.description: Add delete account section to AccountPage
steps.details: In the 'Danger Zone' Card, add a description 'Permanently delete your account and all weight data. This cannot be undone.' and a Button variant='destructive' that sets showDeleteDialog state to true.

Use shadcn/ui Dialog controlled by showDeleteDialog state. DialogHeader: 'Delete Account'. DialogDescription: 'This will permanently delete your account and all weight entries. This action cannot be undone.' DialogFooter: Cancel Button (variant='outline', onClick=close dialog) and Delete Account Button (variant='destructive', onClick=handleDeleteAccount, shows loading spinner when deleting).

handleDeleteAccount: call deleteAccount() from apiService. On success: call auth.logout() from AuthContext (which clears localStorage and redirects to /login). On error: close dialog and show error message.

Click Delete Account — verify dialog opens. Take screenshot of dialog. Click Cancel — verify dialog closes with no action. Click Delete Account again, then confirm in dialog — verify redirect to /login. Attempt to log in with the deleted account's credentials — verify login fails.

technicalNotes: Use controlled Dialog (open prop) rather than uncontrolled for predictable behavior
auth.logout() should handle clearing localStorage and redirect — don't duplicate that logic here
